SPACECOWBOY-STRAIGHT_LEAD.title: Straight Lead
SPACECOWBOY-DODGE.title: Dodge
SPACECOWBOY-SHOOT.title: Shoot
SPACECOWBOY-JEET_KUNE_DO.title: Jeet Kune Do
SPACECOWBOY-DONT_BOTHER_NONE.title: Don't Bother None
SPACECOWBOY-BAD_DOG_NO_BISCUITS.title: Bad Dog No Biscuits
SPACECOWBOY-SPOKEY_DOKEY.title: Spokey Dokey
SPACECOWBOY-FELT_TIP_PEN.title: Felt Tip Pen
SPACECOWBOY-RAIN.title: Rain
SPACECOWBOY-RAIN.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Spend up to {MaxSpend:diff()} [gold]Flow[/gold]: gain {PerFlow} more [gold]Block[/gold] for each.
SPACECOWBOY-MEMORY.title: Memory
SPACECOWBOY-FAREWELL_BLUES.title: Farewell Blues
SPACECOWBOY-TWENTY_FOUR_HOURS_OPEN.title: 24 Hours Open
SPACECOWBOY-FANTAISIE_SIGN.title: Fantaisie Sign
SPACECOWBOY-SPEAK_LIKE_A_CHILD.title: Speak Like a Child
SPACECOWBOY-GREEN_BIRD.title: Green Bird
SPACECOWBOY-TANK.title: Tank!
SPACECOWBOY-TANK.description: At the start of your turn, gain {Flow:diff()} [gold]Flow[/gold].
SPACECOWBOY-SPACE_LION.title: Space Lion
SPACECOWBOY-HEAVY_METAL_QUEEN.title: Heavy Metal Queen
SPACECOWBOY-HEAVY_METAL_QUEEN.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage, plus {PerFlow} for each [gold]Flow[/gold].
Lose ALL [gold]Flow[/gold].
SPACECOWBOY-SYMPATHY_FOR_THE_DEVIL.title: Sympathy for the Devil
SPACECOWBOY-SYMPATHY_FOR_THE_DEVIL.descr:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Heal {Heal} HP.
[gold]In the Flow[/gold]: heal {FlowHeal} HP instead.
SPACECOWBOY-COWBOY_FUNK.title: Cowboy Funk
SPACECOWBOY-COWBOY_FUNK.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Hits} times.
[gold]In the Flow[/gold]: attack once more and spend {FlowSpend} [gold]Flow[/gold].
SPACECOWBOY-MUSHROOM_HUNTING.title: Mushroom Hunting
SPACECOWBOY-JUPITER_JAZZ.title: Jupiter Jazz
SPACECOWBOY-JUPITER_JAZZ.description: At the end of your turn, if you are [gold]In the Flow[/gold], gain {Strength:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
SPACECOWBOY-ASTEROID_BLUES.title: Asteroid Blues
SPACECOWBOY-ASTEROID_BLUES.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If this is the first card you played this turn, gain {Flow} [gold]Flow[/gold].
SPACECOWBOY-MY_FUNNY_VALENTINE.title: My Funny Valentine
SPACECOWBOY-GOODNIGHT_JULIA.title: Goodnight Julia
SPACECOWBOY-CALL_ME_CALL_ME.title: Call Me Call Me
SPACECOWBOY-CALL_ME_CALL_ME.description:
Put a card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Gain {Flow:diff()} [gold]Flow[/gold].
SPACECOWBOY-CALL_ME_CALL_ME.selectionScr: Choose a card to put into your Hand.
SPACECOWBOY-BANG.title: Bang.
SPACECOWBOY-BANG.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage, plus {PerFlow} for each [gold]Flow[/gold]. Lose ALL [gold]Flow[/gold].
At the start of your next turn, lose {Weight:diff()} HP.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold].
SPACECOWBOY-BALLAD_OF_FALLEN_ANGELS.desc:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Gain {Flow} [gold]Flow[/gold].
SPACECOWBOY-THE_REAL_FOLK_BLUES.title: The Real Folk Blues
SPACECOWBOY-THE_REAL_FOLK_BLUES.descript:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Draw {Cards} {Cards:plural:card|cards}. Gain {Flow} [gold]Flow[/gold].
SPACECOWBOY-JAMMING_WITH_EDWARD.title: Jamming with Edward
SPACECOWBOY-JAMMING_WITH_EDWARD.descript:
Gain 1 [gold]Flow[/gold] for each card in your hand.
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold].
SPACECOWBOY-AVE_MARIA.title: Ave Maria
SPACECOWBOY-AVE_MARIA.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]In the Flow[/gold]: deal {FlowDamage:diff()} damage instead.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold].
SPACECOWBOY-BLUE.title: Blue
SPACECOWBOY-BLUE.description: Whenever you play a card, gain {Flow} [gold]Flow[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If your HP is at or below half, deal double damage.
SPACECOWBOY-CARRY_THAT_WEIGHT.title: Carry That Weight
SPACECOWBOY-CARRY_THAT_WEIGHT.descriptio: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage, plus {PerCard:diff()} for each card in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold].
SPACECOWBOY-ASK_DNA.title: Ask DNA
SPACECOWBOY-ASK_DNA.description:
The next [gold]Attack[/gold] you play this turn is played twice.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold].
